---
title: "About"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: false
    always_allow_html: true
---

<div class="page-content">



```{=html}

<h3>Academic positions</h3>
<ul>
  <li>
    <b>10/2024 - Today</b> – Associate Professor, Faculty of Economics and Management, Free University of Bozen-Bolzano
  </li>
  <li>
    <b>02/2024 - 09/2024</b> – Senior Assistant Professor (rtdB), Department of Economics, University of Bergamo
  </li>
  <li>
    <b>01/2022 - 01/2024</b> – Junior Assistant Professor (rtdA), Faculty of Economics and Management, Free University of Bozen-Bolzano
  </li>
  <li>
    <b>11/2019 - 12/2021</b> – Postdoctoral Research Fellow, School of Mathematics and Statistics, University College Dublin.  
    Affiliated with Vistamilk SFI Research Centre, Insight SFI Research Center.  
    Supervisor: Prof. T. B. Murphy
  </li>
</ul>

<h3>Education</h3>
<ul>
  <li>
    <b>[2016-2020]</b> – PhD in Statistics, University of Padova
    <ul>
      <li>Supervisor: Prof. Giovanna Menardi</li>
      <li>
        Thesis title: <i>Climbing modes and exploring mixtures: a journey in density-based clustering</i> 
        <a href="http://paduaresearch.cab.unipd.it/12085/">(Link)</a>
      </li>
    </ul>
  </li>
  <li>
    <b>[2014-2016]</b> – Master Degree in Statistical Sciences, University of Padova
    <ul>
      <li>Final degree: 110/110 cum laude</li>
    </ul>
  </li>
  <li>
    <b>[2011-2014]</b> – Bachelor Degree in Statistics, Economics and Finance, University of Padova
    <ul>
      <li>Final degree: 110/110 cum laude</li>
    </ul>
  </li>
</ul>


```

</div>
